Official Portfolio

## About

Elesh Vaishnav is a student developer from Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India.

His interests include:
- Artificial Intelligence
- Machine Learning
- Mathematics
- Web Development
- Computer Vision
- Automation
- Software Engineering

## Skills

Programming:
- JavaScript
- HTML
- CSS
- Python

Technologies:
- Git
- GitHub
- GitHub Pages
- OpenCV
- TensorFlow
- PyTorch

## Projects

This portfolio showcases software projects, AI experiments, and web development work created by Elesh Vaishnav.

Topics include:
- Artificial Intelligence
- Machine Learning
- Computer Vision
- Interactive Web Applications
- Research
- Automation
